content:
This is the beginning of osousa.com — my personal space to write about cybersecurity, networking, and whatever I happen to be learning or working on.
I’m a Cybersecurity Analyst based in Mozambique, currently working at Hidroeléctrica de Cahora Bassa. After 20 years in IT across systems analysis, networking, and service desk management, I’ve recently moved fully into security — and there’s always something new to learn, document, and share.
What to expect here Writeups on security topics, tools, and techniques Notes from training and certifications Observations from working in security within critical infrastructure The occasional post on networking, Linux, or systems No ads, no tracking, no fluff. Just notes from the field.
summary:
This is the beginning of osousa.com — my personal space to write about cybersecurity, networking, and whatever I happen to be learning or working on.

I’m a Cybersecurity Analyst based in Mozambique, currently working at Hidroeléctrica de Cahora Bassa. After 20 years in IT across systems analysis, networking, and service desk management, I’ve recently moved fully into security — and there’s always something new to learn, document, and share.

What to expect here

  • Writeups on security topics, tools, and techniques
  • Notes from training and certifications
  • Observations from working in security within critical infrastructure
  • The occasional post on networking, Linux, or systems

No ads, no tracking, no fluff. Just notes from the field.
title: Hello World

content:
I am a Mozambican Information Technology professional with over 20 years of experience across cybersecurity, systems analysis, networking, and service desk management. Currently working as a Cyber Security Analyst at Hidroeléctrica de Cahora Bassa (HCB), one of Africa’s largest hydroelectric power plants, where I have been part of the IT team for nearly 14 years.
My career has spanned the energy and hospitality sectors, giving me a broad perspective on how organisations of different sizes and industries manage and protect their technology infrastructure.
Experience Cyber Security Analyst — Hidroeléctrica de Cahora Bassa (2024 – Present) Focused on security operations, incident handling, and threat monitoring in a critical infrastructure environment.
Systems Analyst — Hidroeléctrica de Cahora Bassa (2014 – 2024) Over a decade of systems analysis supporting the operational and business technology needs of HCB.
Analyst Programmer — Hidroeléctrica de Cahora Bassa (2012 – 2013)
IT Area Responsible MZ & SA — Grupo Pestana (2006 – 2012) Managed IT operations across Mozambique and South Africa for one of Portugal’s largest hospitality groups.
Administrator — Netop Lda. (2011 – 2012)
Director — IT&Dreams, Lda (2005 – 2006)
Certifications GIAC Security Essentials (GSEC) GIAC Security Operations Certified (GSOC) Cisco CCNA — ISCTEM Cisco CCNA Academy D-Link Certified Engineer — D-Link Academy South Africa Training & Courses Course Code Hacker Tools, Techniques, and Incident Handling (GCIH) SEC504 Security Essentials: Network, Endpoint and Cloud SEC401 SOC Analyst Training — Applied Skills for Cyber Defense Operations SEC450 Red Hat System Administration I — RHEL 8 RH124 Red Hat System Administration II — RHEL 8 RH134 Red Hat System Administration III: Linux Automation — HP Data Protector — HPE 3Par Storage Administration — HPE Blade System Administration — VMware vSphere — Microsoft Windows Server 2012 R2 — ITIL — Zeutschel Book Cradle OT 180 H35 and OT 180 H A0 — Zeutschel OS Q 1st Level — Zeutschel OmniScan OS12 Scanning Software — Technical Skills Security Cybersecurity · Information Security · Cyber Defense · Security Operations Center (SOC) · Incident Response · Incident Handling · Malware Analysis · Malware Detection · Web Application Security · Vulnerability Management · Network Security · Linux Security · Windows Security · Wireless Security · Security Policy · Access Control · Artificial Intelligence (AI)
Networking TCP/IP · CCNA · Cisco Technologies · Cisco Routers · Routing · OSPF · Switches · Routers · LAN · VPN · DNS · Network Administration · Network Architecture · Computer Network Operations · WiFi
Systems & Infrastructure Linux · Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) · Unix · Windows Server · Active Directory · VMware · VMware Infrastructure · Virtualization · System Administration · Servers · Computer Hardware · Operating Systems · Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager · Mac OS · Mac OS X Server · Apple · HP Data Protector · HPE 3Par · HPE Blade Systems · MS-DOS
Development & Databases Web Development · PHP · Microsoft SQL Server
Productivity & Management IT Management · IT Operations · Service Desk Management · ITIL · Troubleshooting · Microsoft Office · Microsoft Word · Microsoft Excel · Microsoft PowerPoint · Microsoft Outlook
Other Digital Photography · Acoustics · Audio Engineering
Recognition 🏆 Ambassador of Innovation — Hidroeléctrica de Cahora Bassa
Languages Portuguese — Native English — Fluent Personal Interests Beyond the terminal, I have a passion for digital photography and acoustics — two disciplines that, much like security, reward careful attention to detail.
Feel free to connect with me on LinkedIn — or if you prefer, use the contact form to send me a message directly.
title: About
